items.resultTextLog:
Navigator: Captain, I've been monitoring the corridors. Someone has been tampering with the logs.
Engineer: Don't look at me! The Doctor's been acting strange since the jump.
Doctor: Stress affects us all. The Pilot has been muttering to himself.
Pilot: We're all losing it. The ship... it's watching.

System: [SYSTEM] Log fragment: [REDACTED] accessed Gravity Drive at 00:15.
Doctor: The crew are hallucinating. I've seen things. In the corridors.
Navigator: Or it's real. One of us brought it back.
Pilot: We need to find who. Before it's too late.

System: [SYSTEM] Reactor damage: CRITICAL. Repair impossible while entity presence detected.
Engineer: The thing is feeding on the core. We have to purge the host first.
Navigator: Execute the imposter. Seal the rift. Or we all burn.

Navigator: Captain, we need to act. The entity is among us.
Engineer: But which one?
Doctor: Observe. The possessed one will slip.
Pilot: Or we all die waiting.

Doctor: Captain, the crew's psychological profiles—one of us has changed. Since the jump.
Navigator: The entity rewrites the host. They look human. They're not.
Engineer: So we're hunting a ghost in a meat suit.
Pilot: And it's hunting us.

Doctor: Captain, the crew's psychological profiles—one of us has changed. Since the jump.
Navigator: The entity rewrites the host. They look human. They're not.
Engineer: So we're hunting a ghost in a meat suit.
Pilot: And it's hunting us.

System: [SYSTEM] Log fragment: [REDACTED] accessed Gravity Drive at 00:15.
Doctor: The crew are hallucinating. I've seen things. In the corridors.
Navigator: Or it's real. One of us brought it back.
Pilot: We need to find who. Before it's too late.

System: [SYSTEM] Hull breach in sector 7. Sealed. For now.
Engineer: It's testing us. Picking us off.
Navigator: We have to find the host.
Doctor: Before there's no one left.

Navigator: Captain, we need to act. The entity is among us.
Engineer: But which one?
Doctor: Observe. The possessed one will slip.
Pilot: Or we all die waiting.

Engineer: Captain, I've checked the reactor. The rift is still open. Something is feeding on it.
Navigator: We're running out of time.
Doctor: Find the host. Purge it. Then we can seal the breach.
Pilot: Or we all get pulled back to... wherever it came from.

Doctor: Captain, the crew's psychological profiles—one of us has changed. Since the jump.
Navigator: The entity rewrites the host. They look human. They're not.
Engineer: So we're hunting a ghost in a meat suit.
Pilot: And it's hunting us.

System: [EMERGENCY ALERT] Engineer terminated. Machinery accident in engine room. Conveyor incident. [End of execution]
Doctor: I saw the Pilot near the engine room. Before the incident.
Navigator: The Doctor was acting erratic. I don't trust them.

System: [EMERGENCY ALERT] Navigator terminated. Airlock seal failure. Pressure differential. Body recovered from corridor. [End of execution]
Doctor: I saw the Pilot near the engine room. Before the incident.
Doctor: I saw the Pilot near the engine room. Before the incident.

System: The host convulses. Something shrieks as it flees the body. Android lubricant. VICTORY. [RESULT: VICTORY]
[REAL_IMPOSTER: Pilot]
[End of execution]
